englishDefinitions: Inserting themselves into scenes or situations, often in a forced, unnatural, or noticeable way.
persianTranslation: خود را به‌زور در صحنه‌ها جا دادن
examples: The critics objected to the actors grafting themselves into scenes where they did not belong.
The film felt awkward when the director kept grafting themselves into scenes.
Viewers noticed the characters grafting themselves into scenes with no clear purpose.
